Boxes.emptyState: No boxes yet. Create your first box or use Auto-fill to get started.
Boxes.confirmReplaceDescription: Auto-fill will replace your current box layout with the selected preset. Your registration data will be preserved.
Boxes.confirmDeleteBoxWithPokemon: This box contains Pokemon. Do you want to delete it anyway?

Settings.variationsSectionDescription: Choose which Pokémon variation types to include in your tracking.
Settings.boxDisplaySectionDescription: Customize how Pokémon are shown in the box grid.
Settings.showPokemonNamesInBoxSubtitle: Display the Pokémon name below each sprite in the box grid

VariationToggles.warningTooltip: You have registered Pokémon of this variation type. Disabling this toggle will hide them from tracking, but won't delete your data.

alcremieVariations.label: Alcremie Variations

colorVariations.subtitle: Pokémon with alternate color forms (e.g. Flabébé)

sizeVariations.subtitle: Pokémon with distinct size forms (e.g. Pumpkaboo)

battleForms.label: Battle Forms
battleForms.subtitle: Forms that change during battle (e.g. Aegislash)

originForms.label: Origin Forms
originForms.subtitle: Origin Formes and special alternate forms
